string.text: Event pipeline controls. Events pass through: A-Life ratio -> distributor -> per-cause limit -> per-consequence limit. Each gate narrows the flow independently.

Gate 1. X-Ray runs the current level per-frame and background levels round-robin. Slider sets how many out of 10 event slots go to the current level (8 = 4:1, 0 = equal, negative = background favored).
Gate 3. Max publications per cause type per 60s. Prevents one cause from monopolizing the event bus.
Gate 4. Max activations per consequence type per 60s. Prevents one consequence from firing too often.
Maximum concurrent destination locks per smart terrain. Prevents multiple squads from converging on the same target.
How long a destination lock persists before expiring. Wall-clock seconds.

Persistent registry for AlifePlus. Tracks kills, promotions, scripted squads, and conquered areas. Survives save/load. Periodic sync is a failsafe for stale entries caused by badly written mods interacting with the system.
Enable periodic cleanup of stale entries. Belt-and-suspenders failsafe.
How often to scan for stale entries (300-1800 seconds).
Reactive. NPC accumulated enough kills to level up as an elite. 10 levels, each requiring more kills.
Fire cause:elite when NPC reaches a new elite level.
Kills required per elite level. At 2: level 1 at 2 kills, level 10 at 20 kills.
Fire cause:elitekill event when elites die. Required for bounty and targeted systems.
Reactive. Deaths pile up at a smart terrain.
Track death accumulation and fire massacre events when threshold reached.
Deaths required in area before massacre event fires.
Time window for death accumulation. Deaths older than this don't count.
NPC evaluates nearby stashes on smart terrain transition.
Reactive. A squad has been wiped out.
Fire cause:squadkill event when last squad member dies.
Reactive. Deaths pile up at a faction base.
Track deaths at faction bases and fire events when threshold reached.
Deaths required at base before event fires.
Time window for death accumulation at base.
Reactive. An NPC or player used a healing item.
Fire event when NPC or player uses healing item.
Radiant. Squad discovers nearby unguarded area.
NPC evaluates nearby area on smart terrain transition.
Reactive. An NPC or player picked up an artefact.
Fire cause:harvest when artefact is picked up.

Radiant. Squads develop human needs over time (hunger, sleep, rest, healing, shelter, money, supplies, duty, social). Hull drive scoring picks the strongest unmet need. Thresholds are game-hours between need events.
Evaluate stalker needs on smart terrain transitions. Strongest unmet need fires as a cause event.
Enable hunger need. Squads seek campfires to eat when overdue.
Enable sleep need. Night-gated (20:00-05:00). Squads seek campfires to sleep.
Enable rest need. Squads seek campfires to smoke, drink, or relax.
Enable heal need. Squads return to friendly bases for medical attention.
Enable shelter need. Squads seek non-enemy bases for environmental protection.
Enable money need. Squads visit anomaly zones or mutant lairs for resources.
Enable supply need. Squads visit traders for resupply.
Enable job need. Squads guard, explore, research, worship, or exercise based on faction.
Enable social need. Squads gather at campfires or bases for human connection.
Game-hours between hunger events. Default 8 (3 meals/day).
Game-hours between sleep events. Night-gated (20:00-05:00). Default 16.
Game-hours between rest events (smoke, drink, relax). Default 4.
Game-hours between supply events (trader visit, stash deposit). Default 48.
Game-hours between job events (guard, explore, research). Default 18.
Game-hours between social events (campfire gathering, base visit). Default 36.
When the Elite cause fires, registers the NPC as elite. Includes rank boost, grenade restock, and AP ammo restock scaled by elite level (1-10).
Register stalkers as elites when they level up from kills.
Maximum number of elites allowed worldwide. Only blocks new elites, not level-ups.
Chance to broadcast PDA message when an elite levels up.
Boost engine rank for elites based on level. Higher rank improves NPC accuracy by up to 20%.
Give grenades to elite stalkers when hit. Count equals elite level (1-10).
Real-time hours between grenade restocks per NPC.
Give best armor-piercing ammo for the elite's weapon when hit. Boxes scale by level.
Real-time hours between AP ammo restocks per NPC.
When the EliteKill cause fires, rewards the killer. Both player and NPC killers receive rubles scaled by the elite's level.
Reward killer with rubles when an elite dies.
Rubles per elite level. At 1000 RU/level, killing a level 5 elite = 5000 RU.
Chance to notify when bounty is claimed. 0 = disabled.
When the EliteKill cause fires, other elites on the same level pursue the killer (NPC or player) organically through the simulation as it moves.
Other elites hunt down whoever killed an elite.
Probability that nearby elites pursue the killer.
Maximum hunter squads that pursue the elite killer (random 1..N).
Maximum times a hunter re-scripts to follow a fleeing killer. 0 disables chase.
Chance to send PDA notification when hunters pursue.
When the Massacre cause fires, nearby scavengers (outlaws and necrophile mutants) converge on the site.
Scavengers converge on massacre sites to scavenge corpses.
Probability scavengers respond to a massacre event.
Maximum scavenger squads that respond to a massacre.
Chance to send PDA notification when scavengers respond.
When the Massacre cause fires, the victims' faction sends nearby squads to investigate the site.
Factions send squads when their own die.
Maximum faction squads that investigate a massacre (random 1..N).
Chance to send PDA notification when faction investigates. 0 = disabled.
When the Stash cause fires, the discovering squad (outlaws) camps at the stash location. They don't touch the stash, it's bait.
Bandits camp at revealed stash locations and wait.
Probability bandits set up ambush at stash location.
Chance to send PDA notification when ambush is set up. 0 = disabled.
When the Stash cause fires, the discovering stalker squad moves to loot the stash. What's inside is unknown until arrival.
Scavengers race to revealed stashes to loot them before player arrives.
Probability scavengers start racing to stash location.
Chance to send PDA notification when looters race to stash. 0 = disabled.
When the Stash cause fires, the discovering stalker squad moves to hide supplies in the stash. What's inside is unknown until arrival.
Stalkers hide supplies in stashes they discover.
Probability stalkers hide items in a stash.
Minimum items to hide in stash.
Maximum items to hide in stash.
Chance to send PDA notification when stalkers hide items. 0 = disabled.
When the SquadKill cause fires, nearby same-faction squads pursue the killer (NPC or player) organically through the simulation as it moves.
Nearby friendly squads pursue killers when squad is wiped.
Probability nearby friendlies pursue the killers.
Maximum avenger squads that pursue a killer (random 1..N).
Maximum times an avenger re-scripts to follow a fleeing killer. 0 disables chase.
When the SquadKill cause fires, nearby squads of the victim's faction flee to the nearest faction base.
Squads retreat to safety when nearby friendlies are eliminated.
Probability nearby squads flee after witnessing squad wipe.
Maximum squads that flee per event (random 1..N).
Chance to send PDA notification when squads flee.
When the BaseKill cause fires, nearby friendly squads rush to reinforce the base under attack.
Nearby squads rush to reinforce base under attack.
Probability nearby friendlies respond to base attack.
Maximum reinforcement squads sent to defend base (random 1..N).
When the BaseKill cause fires, squads at the base evacuate to the nearest faction base.
Squads abandon base under heavy attack and retreat to safety.
Probability squads flee when base is under attack.
Maximum squads that flee per event (random 1..N).
Chance to send PDA notification when squads flee base.
When the Wounded cause fires, nearby predator mutants move toward the wounded NPC or player.
Predators hunt wounded NPCs or player.
Maximum predator squads drawn to wounded (random 1..N).
When the Wounded cause fires, nearby same-faction squads rush to help the wounded NPC or player.
Faction members rush to assist wounded comrades.
Probability faction sends help when member is wounded.
Maximum helper squads sent per event (random 1..N).
Chance to send PDA notification when help is dispatched.
When the Area cause fires, the discovering squad moves to claim the empty smart terrain. The conqueror's faction takes ownership and the engine spawns their squads there.
Probability of conquering when area becomes empty.
Enable persistent area ownership via respawn mutation.
Maximum smart terrains that can be conquered. FIFO eviction when reached.
Number of squads to spawn at conquered area.
When the Harvest cause fires, nearby outlaws and anomalous creatures pursue the NPC or player who picked up the artefact organically through the simulation as they move.
Probability hunters respond to artefact pickup.
Maximum hunter squads that pursue the artefact taker (random 1..N).
Maximum times a hunter re-scripts to follow a fleeing taker. 0 disables chase.
Chance to send PDA notification when hunters pursue.
When hunger fires, squad moves to a campfire smart to eat and drink.
Hungry stalkers seek campfires to eat.
Probability squad moves to campfire when hungry.
Chance to send PDA notification. 0 = disabled.
When sleep fires, squad moves to a campfire smart to sleep. Night-gated by cause (20:00-05:00).
Tired stalkers seek campfires to sleep at night.
Probability squad moves to campfire to sleep.
Chance to send PDA notification. 0 = disabled.
When rest fires, squad moves to a campfire smart to relax, smoke, or drink.
Fatigued stalkers seek campfires to rest.
Probability squad moves to campfire to rest.
Chance to send PDA notification. 0 = disabled.
When heal fires, squad moves to a non-enemy faction base for medical attention.
Wounded stalkers seek friendly bases for healing.
Probability squad moves to base for healing.
Chance to send PDA notification. 0 = disabled.
When shelter fires, squad moves to a non-enemy faction base for environmental protection.
Exposed stalkers seek shelter at friendly bases.
Probability squad moves to base for shelter.
Chance to send PDA notification. 0 = disabled.
When money fires, squad moves to an anomaly zone to search for artefacts.
Stalkers seek anomaly zones when they need money.
Probability squad moves to anomaly zone for artefacts.
Chance to send PDA notification. 0 = disabled.
When money fires, squad moves to a mutant lair to hunt for trophies and pelts.
Stalkers hunt mutants when they need money.
Probability squad moves to mutant lair for hunting.
Chance to send PDA notification. 0 = disabled.
When supply fires, squad moves to a trader smart to exchange goods.
Stalkers visit traders when they need supplies.
Probability squad moves to trader for resupply.
Chance to send PDA notification. 0 = disabled.
When job fires, squad moves to own-faction base to stand guard.
Stalkers guard their faction bases when duty calls.
Probability squad moves to base for guard duty.
Chance to send PDA notification. 0 = disabled.
When job fires, squad moves to a distant or unvisited smart terrain to explore.
Stalkers explore unknown areas when duty calls.
Probability squad moves out to explore.
Chance to send PDA notification. 0 = disabled.
When job fires, squad moves to an anomaly zone to study anomalous phenomena.
Stalkers research anomaly zones when duty calls.
Probability squad moves to anomaly zone for research.
Chance to send PDA notification. 0 = disabled.
When job fires, Monolith/Sin/Zombied squads move to a faction smart for psy-worship rituals.
Fanatic factions perform worship rituals at their smarts.
Probability squad moves to faction smart for worship.
Chance to send PDA notification. 0 = disabled.
When job fires, Military/UNISG squads move to base for physical training exercises.
Military factions train at their bases.
Probability squad moves to base for exercise.
Chance to send PDA notification. 0 = disabled.
When social fires, squad moves to a campfire smart to play guitar, tell stories, or socialize.
Probability squad moves to campfire for socializing.
Chance to send PDA notification. 0 = disabled.
When social fires, squad moves to own-faction base for companionship and morale.
Lonely stalkers return to base for company.
Probability squad moves to base for socializing.
Chance to send PDA notification. 0 = disabled.
Debug and development. DEBUG enables tracing, performance timing, and PDA map markers. When off there will be zero overhead.
Controls log verbosity and debug features. DEBUG enables OTel-style tracing, performance timing, and verbose logs. Has performance cost.
